en: I told y'all three years ago Ozempic had Hollywood in a chokehold.
I ain't lying. Y'all seen Oprah, she got the body of a 12-year-old boy.
She ain't never even been a 12-year-old boy. That shit is strong.
Gayle look like she ain't had a bowel movement since she came back from space.
Her and the wig look confused.
